name: Italian Herbed Potatoes (Dupree)
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds new potatoes, cut into 1-1/2 inches cubes
1/2 cup chopped scallions, or green onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes in a large pan of boiling water to cover. Bring back to the boil, cover, and reduce heat.
2. Simmer 30 minutes, or until tender. Drain and put into a bowl.
3. Sprinkle parsley, basil, and scallions over potatoes.
4. In a bowl combine garlic, mustard, sugar, Worcestershire sauce, olive oil, and vinegar.
5. Pour the mixture over the potatoes. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Combine everything and let stand at least 4 hours or up to 1 week. Stir occasionally.
7. Cover and serve at room temperature. Refrigerate if keeping more than a day. May also be served hot. Reheat quickly in a frying pan or microwave.
Yield: 16 servings
